notes: Starter beach logic based on user preferences from the planning thread. Edit rules as you learn more about each beach.

beaches.name: Gas House Beach
beaches.display_note: High tide: paddle boarding. Low tide: Brown's Island walk, though Preston is usually the better low-tide walk.

rules.note: Best near high tide for paddle boarding in the harbor. Avoid if winds are too strong.
Fun around low tide when the route is exposed, but usually second choice behind Preston for a pure low-tide walk. Leave margin for the tide turning.

beaches.name: Preston Beach
beaches.display_note: Avoid high tide. Best once tide is out and still dropping, or within about an hour after low.

rules.note: Best when the tide is already out and continuing out, or has only been coming in for an hour or so.

beaches.name: Devereux Beach
beaches.display_note: Good at most tide stages, with bathrooms and showers; low tide adds a short walk, but it is not a paddleboarding pick.

rules.note: Reliable beach stop with facilities; low tide adds beach space, but the walk is short.
Good general beach option when the weather is better than the more tide-specific windows.
